case_title: DEARYL T. FORD VS. MB BODYSHOP OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC.,

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF SERVICE: RE NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION ( WAGE GARNISHMENT - ENFORCEMENT OF JUDGMENT) PARTY SERVED TIFFANY COLES ON SEPT. 16, 2004 AT 1:30 PM BY PERSON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORD, DEARYL T.
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORD, DEARYL T. AS TO DEFENDANT MB BODYSHOP OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION HEARING SET FOR OCT-06-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 612
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF FORD, DEARYL T.

DISCOVERY, 612, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION WAS NOT FILED BY AN ATTORNEY. A BUSINESS ENTITY MAY NOT APPEAR EXCEPT BY COUNSEL. NO GROUNDS HAVE BEEN ASSERTED TO SUPPORT ANY GROUNDS FOR THE CLAIM RECOGNIZED UNDER THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $10,982.20 AS TO DEFENDANT MB BODYSHOP OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MB BODYSHOP OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
